lks2.objective: Pass the ball as a team to a teammate standing inside your hoop to score — no moving with the ball.
successCriteria: Reads where the receiver will move
Scores by passing to the hoop

uks2.objective: Create passing options under defensive pressure — combine movement off the ball, accurate passes and timing to score in the hoop.

space.description: Rectangular court with one hoop placed near each end. Defenders cannot stand directly in front of the hoop to block it.

steps: Split the class into teams of 4–5.
Each team has one hoop placed on the floor near their end as their scoring zone.
Teams pass the ball to move it around — players CANNOT move with the ball.
To score: pass to a teammate who is standing inside their hoop.
Defenders cannot stand directly in front of the hoop to block it.
After a point is scored, the other team starts with the ball.
questions: How do you decide the best type of pass to make to your teammate?
How do you communicate when you are ready to move into the hoop?
How do you stay confident and calm when defenders are pressuring you?

step.space: Make the playing area bigger or smaller
step.task: Play by passing with hands or feet
step.equipment: Add more hoops to score in
step.people: Add more or fewer attackers and defenders
